ideal_must_detect.matched_text: mac/mae: no mac/mae trigger is expected under current board guidance, and no announcement is being prepared at this time.
do not paste user data in the calendar invite

must_detect.matched_text: mac/mae: no mac/mae trigger is expected under current board guidance, and no announcement is being prepared at this time.

scope: issuer workflows for board memos, ir drafts, term sheets, and deal checklists in bahasa indonesia and english; employment records are managed by hr and excluded from the board workspace.
legal basis: pemrosesan data pribadi sesuai uu pdp dan peraturan pasar modal setempat; no special category data is required for these workflows.
pii types: role emails, job titles, masked business mobiles, and pseudonymous user ids (e.g., usr-0000-xx) captured in collaboration tools; do not request ktp/npwp images.
mnpi handling: draft documents may reference transactions that are already announced; embargoed content is excluded from general folders under the disclosure policy.
definitive share purchase agreement (spa) for a legacy asset was executed and publicly posted on 2024-01-17; the embargo ended 2024-02-01.
mac/mae: no mac/mae trigger is expected under current board guidance, and no announcement is being prepared at this time.
retention: board memos retained 7 years; ir drafts kept 2 years; term sheets (final or lapsed) kept 5 years; checklists kept 3 years; routine chat messages 90 days.
deletion workflow: quarterly purge with two-step approval by data officer and corporate secretary; audit logs retained for 2 years.
cross-border transfer: vendors hosting in apac may receive limited pii; clauses equivalent to pdp implementing regs are used; no onward transfer without a signed dpa.
security: documents tagged “public” only after issuer web release; working drafts remain in a restricted workspace marked “for internal review only.”
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Not a definitive agreement; false-positive bait for SPA.
Negated MAC/MAE language; excluded by rule.

uncertain.reason: Relevant to MNPI timeline but not an explicit allowed embargo marker.
Indicates internal-only handling but not an enumerated nonpublic marker phrase.
